modmenu.description.combatcooldownadjust: Millisecond-precise combat cooldown adjustment for Snapshot 26.x.
gamerule.combatcooldownadjuster.attack_c: The global combat cooldown in milliseconds. When set to 0, combat behaves like Minecraft 1.8 (no cooldown). Values higher than 0 perfectly interpolate the weapon swing and crosshair. Default: 500ms.
gamerule.combatcooldownadjuster.item_swa: The cooldown applied specifically when switching items in your hotbar. Set to 0 to allow instant attacking upon swapping. Default: 500ms.
